ci_support_linux_64_hdf51.14.6.yaml:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
glog:
- '0.7'
hdf5:
- 1.14.6
ipopt:
- 3.14.19
libblas:
- 3.9.* *netlib
libboost_devel:
- '1.88'
libboost_headers:
- '1.88'
liblapack:
- 3.9.* *netlib
libxml2_devel:
- '2.14'
nlopt:
- '2.10'
python_min:
- '3.10'
target_platform:
- linux-64
tbb_devel:
- '2022'
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version
zlib:
- '1'
name: openturns
raw_meta_yaml:
context:
  version: "1.26.1"

package:
  name: openturns
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/openturns/openturns/archive/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 41ddda08a44ea9980e725987669d49448280acb2c8e06d9d279a7321ec9452c0

build:
  number: 3
  python:
    version_independent: true

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
    - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
    - cmake
    - ninja
    - swig
    - if: linux
      then: diffutils
    - if: win
      then: m2-diffutils
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python-abi3 ${{ python_min }}.*
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
  host:
    - python-abi3 ${{ python_min }}.*
    - python ${{ python_min }}.*
    - libboost-headers
    - matplotlib-base
    - mpc
    - libblas
    - liblapack
    - libxml2-devel
    - tbb-devel
    - cminpack
    - ceres-solver * *lgpl*
    - glog
    - nlopt
    - dlib-cpp
    - ipopt
    - spectralib
    - hdf5
    - highs
    - pagmo-devel
    - libboost-devel
    - primesieve
    - libcuba
    - nanoflann
    - zlib
    - if: not win
      then: coin-or-bonmin
  run:
    - python >=${{ python_min }}
    - dill
    - psutil
    - tbb-devel
    - highs
    - ceres-solver * *lgpl*
  run_exports:
    - ${{ pin_subpackage('openturns', upper_bound='x.x') }}

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - openturns
  - script:
      - if: win
        then:
          - if not exist %PREFIX%\\Library\\bin\\openturns.conf exit 1

about:
  homepage: http://openturns.org/
  license: LGPL-3.0-or-later
  license_family: LGPL
  license_file: COPYING.LESSER
  summary: Uncertainty treatment library

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - jschueller
